message:
fix(ci): cross-platform compatibility for macOS, Windows, and coverage

- Add Mach-O binary format support for binary_hash tests (macOS)
  - Support __text, __const, __cstring sections in addition to ELF .text/.rodata
  - Fix is_debug_section for Mach-O __debug sections
  - Tests now pass on both Linux (ELF) and macOS (Mach-O)

- Make openssh dependency Unix-only for Windows compatibility
  - Create ssh_utils.rs with platform-independent utilities
  - Keep ssh.rs as Unix-only with openssh-dependent code
  - Update imports in rch, rchd to use ssh_utils

- Fix coverage job to exclude true-e2e feature
  - E2E tests require pre-built binaries not available in coverage
  - Use --features rich-ui instead of --all-features

- Add checks:write permission for security audit job
  - Required for rustsec/audit-check to create check runs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -17,6 +17,7 @@ concurrency:
 permissions:
   contents: read
   pull-requests: write  # For benchmark comments
+  checks: write  # For security audit check runs
 
 env:
   CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
@@ -405,24 +406,25 @@ jobs:
       - name: Generate LCOV coverage
         env:
           RCH_MOCK_SSH: '1'
-        run: cargo llvm-cov --all-features --workspace --lcov --output-path lcov.info
+        # Exclude true-e2e feature which requires pre-built binaries
+        run: cargo llvm-cov --features rich-ui --workspace --lcov --output-path lcov.info
       - name: Generate HTML coverage report
         env:
           RCH_MOCK_SSH: '1'
-        run: cargo llvm-cov --all-features --workspace --html --output-dir coverage-html
+        run: cargo llvm-cov --features rich-ui --workspace --html --output-dir coverage-html
       - name: Generate per-crate coverage summary
         env:
           RCH_MOCK_SSH: '1'
         run: |
           echo "## Coverage Summary" > coverage-summary.md
           echo "" >> coverage-summary.md
-          cargo llvm-cov --all-features --workspace --text 2>&1 | tee -a coverage-summary.md
+          cargo llvm-cov --features rich-ui --workspace --text 2>&1 | tee -a coverage-summary.md
       - name: Check coverage threshold
         env:
           RCH_MOCK_SSH: '1'
         # Fail if line coverage drops below 65% (goal: 75%)
         # See bead remote_compilation_helper-pacy for progress tracking
-        run: cargo llvm-cov --all-features --workspace --fail-under-lines 65
+        run: cargo llvm-cov --features rich-ui --workspace --fail-under-lines 65
       - uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
         with:
           files: lcov.info
